{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221053104E22B747E6458E9CF716"}"},"total":5695},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7161404588992987916","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错了，看得很爽，很上头，喜欢这种设定，主角光环强的很，就是结尾我感觉有点仓促，新入坑小伙伴提醒下，此书无CP且男主一直远程线上交流，男主强强强是爽文，还挺新奇的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1667394538,"group_id":"6954207040537365512","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw/F1xUyMjzzHitDVst3N5QtsGbhSPqcGfqjvfP5EPvv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4bdf746bc3fa4dba960711a5779564be~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702369&x-signature=Q%2BiF10YySx9ZHqCNwlhrRHDxAvQ%3D","user_id":"2643701783600544","user_name":"怹畅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2643701783600544","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1736269901,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6954207040537365512","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世度假+轻松+搞笑+凡尔赛】末日开启了。
叶良人利用系统，将自己的避难所进行了全方位的升级。
水龙头，可根据宿主需求，自动变成冷水、热水、饮料、咖啡、牛奶（甚至是82年拉菲）！
制造的服装，不但能够防火，还能够抵御零下一百五十度以上的寒温！
升级的网络，更是达到了万兆光纤！
同时，他还在避难所里建造了生态牧场、大型植物养殖基地。
……
在外界所有人，面临无数天灾，饥不择食，难以存活的时候。
叶良人喝着82年的拉菲，吃着m8澳洲和牛肉。
就算是在末日，也还是要有仪式感的！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/a9a76ebdeeb4562926fb6e5d66e41ad5","author":"月初十","author_id":"","book_id":"6954207040537365512","book_name":"全球灾变：开局建设地下城","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#481018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5528人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6955087020029346312","read_count":"5528","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1053231"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"508","tags":"科幻末世,系统,穿越,末世,求生,开局,囤物资,末日求生,搞笑轻松,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/508b4079422f9762f500e23a9751eaa
